t_ch: 金色的美梦已经足够了。余下的这点时间，也只是「圣杯」的一点馈赠而已。
t_en: The golden dream is more than enough for me. The rest of this time is just a gift from the Holy Grail.

t_ch: 你还是爱说些大家听不懂的话。不过，倒也挺有趣的。
t_en: You've got a way of saying things no one understands. But... it's kind of intriguing.

t_ch: 舒翁背过身去，糖浆、冰块和酒杯碰撞，迸发出晶莹的交响乐。
t_en: Siobhan turns away. The sound of syrup, ice, and glass clinking together is like a crystal symphony.

t_ch: 蓝发的异乡英雄笑着倚在吧台上，逐渐变得透明，直到消散在不存在的风里。
t_en: The blue-haired foreign hero leans against the bar with a smile, slowly becoming transparent, until he vanishes into the wind that didn't exist.

t_ch: 那个忆泡…他是你的朋友吗？
t_en: That Memory Bubble... Is he your friend?

t_ch: 算是吧。
t_en: You could say that.

t_ch: 不打不相识那种。
t_en: Sometimes fights lead to friendship.

t_ch: 过命的交情。
t_en: We've been through so much together.

t_ch: 无论是猎犬还是猛犬，小狗都总是喜欢不告而别呢……
t_en: Whether it's the Bloodhound or the Hound, pups always seem to leave without saying a word...

t_ch: 要久违地来一杯吗？我请客。
t_en: How about a long-overdue drink? My treat.

t_ch: 好啊。
t_en: Sure.

t_ch: 就当是替匹诺康尼表示感谢吧，一杯「长眠不醒」，敬，往日的幽灵。
t_en: Consider it a token of gratitude on behalf of Penacony. A glass of "The Big Sleep" to the ghosts of the past.

t_ch: 奥帝…先生！我肯定是吃错了药，才会信你的那些鬼话！
t_en: Mr. Oti...! I must've been insane to believe your nonsense!

t_ch: 不仅没抢到圣杯，还被巡海游侠打得半身不遂。我被耽误的工时、全勤奖、医药费还有精神损失费，你准备怎么赔我？
t_en: I didn't just lose the Holy Grail. I got brutalized by a Galaxy Ranger! How are you going to compensate me for my lost hours, full attendance bonus, medical bills, and emotional distress?

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，别着急嘛，斯科特先生。我老奥帝做生意向来遵守一个原则，那就是绝不让合作伙伴吃亏。
t_en: Hohoho, take it easy, Mr. Skott. I always stick to one rule when it comes to business: I never let my partners take a loss.

t_ch: 看看你的账户，这场演出的片酬应该已经打到账上了。
t_en: Check your account. Your payment for the performance should've been transferred.

t_ch: 我就知道！老奥帝先生您德高望重、雅量非凡，不会亏待我这可怜巴巴的小喽啰。
t_en: I knew it! Mr. Oti, as a respected and generous man, you'd never leave a poor little guy like me hanging.

t_ch: 您看，我千里迢迢地过来，也没给您带什么特产，一点公司医院的石膏，还望您笑纳。
t_en: You see, I traveled all this way and didn't get the time to bring anything special for you. This is a little plaster from the IPC hospital. Hope you'll like it.

t_ch: 不必拘谨——正巧，咱们的老朋友也来了，你也和{F#她}{M#他}打打招呼吧。
t_en: Don't be shy — as luck would have it, our old friend is here too. Go ahead and say hello to {F#her}{M#him}.

t_ch: 你还活着啊？
t_en: You're still alive?

t_ch: 放心吧，我肯定死在你后头。
t_en: Oh, don't worry. I'll definitely only die after you do.

t_ch: 这次学什么叫？
t_en: So, what sound are we going to have you make this time?

t_ch: 你、你不要欺人太甚！
t_en: Y—You're pushing it too far!

t_ch: 呦，开心果。
t_en: Hey, Mr. Sunshine.

t_ch: 不准这么叫我！
t_en: Don't call me that!

t_ch: 你又过来干什么？今天我可没有招惹你。
t_en: What do you want this time? I didn't mess with you today.

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，斯科特先生，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}多半是来找我算账的。
t_en: Hohoho, Mr. Skott, I'd wager {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} is here to settle a score with me.

t_ch: 你输了。
t_en: You lost.

t_ch: 我想揍你一拳。
t_en: I wanna punch you in the face.

t_ch: 当然可以。但我这满是褶皱的脸皮，如果脏了股东的手，就得不偿失了。
t_en: Be my guest. But this wrinkly old face of mine? Might not be worth dirtying a shareholder's hand.

t_ch: 你到底想做什么？
t_en: What are you up to?

t_ch: 是啊，声势浩大地搞出一场「圣杯战争」，不仅没实现愿望，丢了一大笔赔偿金，还给公司和克劳克影业打了免费广告。
t_en: Yeah, we kicked off this flashy Holy Grail War, didn't get our wish, racked up a fat compensation bill, and gave the IPC and Clock Studios free publicity.

t_ch: 但真是这样吗？那些被吸引来的游客，总不会是假的吧？
t_en: But was it really all for nothing? Those tourists who showed up sure looked real enough.

t_ch: 为钟表小子花钱也罢，为鸢尾花的表演花钱也罢，哪怕把钱投进公司的店铺，只要在匹诺康尼消费，就总有一份钱会流进我的口袋。
t_en: Whether they're paying for Clockie, the Iris shows, or just shopping in the stores — every penny spent in Penacony ends with a little slice in my pocket.

t_ch: 更多的消费者，才是名为匹诺康尼的「圣杯」需要的燃料。
t_en: More consumers — that's the fuel this so-called Holy Grail of Penacony truly runs on.

t_ch: 往好处想，身为股东的你，不也能从中分得一杯羹吗？
t_en: Look on the bright side: You're a shareholder, right? Means you get a slice of the pie too.

t_ch: 我不稀罕。
t_en: I couldn't care less.

t_ch: 你也不怕翻车。
t_en: You're not worried this'll blow up in your face?

t_ch: 你人还怪好勒。
t_en: Oh, that's so nice of you.

t_ch: 时候不早了，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，想必你还有比同一位无趣的老人闲聊更重要的事吧？
t_en: It's getting late, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I'm sure you've got better things to do than chat with a boring old man like me.

t_ch: 如果还有什么想问的，我也可以为你解答一二。
t_en: If you've got questions, I can spare a few answers.

t_ch: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
t_en: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

t_ch: 真是意外的提问，当然可以。
t_en: Well, that's unexpected. I see no reason to refuse.

t_ch: 就知道会——他同意了？怎么办？你压根没想到他会同意你的请求。朋友，你真要摸老奥帝的绒球吗？
t_en: I knew it — wait, he agreed? Uh-oh. You didn't think he'd say yes. Now what? Are you really gonna touch Oti's fluff ball, friend?

t_ch: 反悔还来得及吗？
t_en: Is it too late to back out?

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，当然。祝你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
t_en: Hohohoho, not at all. Enjoy your time in Penacony.

t_ch: 让我摸摸！
t_en: Let me touch it!

t_ch: 你战战兢兢地把手放到绒球上，过于紧张的情绪甚至让你遗忘了它的手感。
t_en: You nervously place your hand on the fluff ball and get so tense that you completely forget what it even feels like.

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，很荣幸能让一位无名客露出这样的表情，祝你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
t_en: Hohohoho, It's an honor to see that expression on a Nameless. Enjoy your stay in Penacony.

t_ch: 再也不见。
t_en: Hope I never see you again.

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，希望你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
t_en: Hohohoho, enjoy your time in Penacony.

t_ch: 呵呵，孩子，你无耻的样子颇有我当年的风采。
t_en: Heh... Kid, that shameless look of yours reminds me of myself back in the day.

t_ch: 如果还有什么想问的，我也可以为你解答一二。
t_en: If you've got questions, I can spare a few answers.

t_ch: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
t_en: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

t_ch: 真是意外的提问，当然可以。
t_en: Well, that's unexpected. I see no reason to refuse.

t_ch: 怎么办？你压根没想到他会同意你的请求。朋友，你真要摸老奥帝的绒球吗？
t_en: Wait, he agreed? Uh-oh. You didn't think he'd say yes. Now what? Are you really gonna touch Oti's fluff ball, friend?

t_ch: 咕，我反悔了！
t_en: Ugh, I changed my mind!

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，当然。祝你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
t_en: Hohohoho, not at all. Enjoy your time in Penacony.

t_ch: 让我摸摸！
t_en: Let me touch it!

t_ch: 你战战兢兢地把手放到绒球上，过于紧张的情绪甚至让你遗忘了它的手感。
t_en: You nervously place your hand on the fluff ball and get so tense that you completely forget what it even feels like.

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，很荣幸能让一位无名客露出这样的表情，祝你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
t_en: Hohohoho, It's an honor to see that expression on a Nameless. Enjoy your stay in Penacony.

t_ch: 再也不见。
t_en: Hope I never see you again.

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，希望你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
t_en: Hohohoho, enjoy your time in Penacony.

t_ch: 呵呵，孩子，你无耻的样子颇有我当年的风采。
t_en: Heh... Kid, that shameless look of yours reminds me of myself back in the day.

t_ch: 你想干什么？{F#奶奶}{M#爷爷}，我今天可真没招惹你吧！再靠近我就要喊猎犬过来了！
t_en: What do you want? Spare me, boss! I swear I didn't mess with you today! Get any closer and I'm calling the Bloodhounds!

t_ch: 许久之前，匹诺康尼。
t_en: Penacony. Long ago.

t_ch: 稀客啊。今天你算是来对时候了，看看这个。
t_en: What a rare visitor! You picked the perfect day to drop by. Take a look at this.

t_ch: 哈努努叛乱时期的「特调配方」，流梦礁的朋友从一堆杂物里捞出来的。
t_en: Signature Recipes from Hanunue's rebellion days! My buddy from Dreamflux Reef fished them out of a pile of junk.

t_ch: 据说这些调饮能勾兑忆质，混淆意识，和联觉梦境产生奇妙的协同反应，从而对饮用者产生<color=#dbc291ff>意料之外的效果</color>。
t_en: Apparently, these concoctions can blend with memoria, blur consciousness, and create fascinating synergies with Synesthesia Dreamscape, producing <color=#dbc291ff>unexpected effects</color> on the drinker.

t_ch: 我实在抽不开身，看你一直对调饮挺感兴趣的，要不要试试看？
t_en: I'm completely tied up right now, but you've always seemed interested in mixology. Want to give it a try?

t_ch: 「配方」也是我开拓的对象！
t_en: Recipes are absolutely part of my Trailblazing mission!

t_ch: 我是一个身经百战的调饮师。
t_en: I am a seasoned drinksmith.

t_ch: 实不相瞒，我可是声振寰宇的调饮大师「闭嘴」的关门弟子。
t_en: If I may be honest, I'm the apprentice of the legendary drinksmith master Shush.

t_ch: 那是谁？好古怪的名字。既然是位受你认可的调饮师，也带过来让我见见呗。
t_en: Who's that? What a peculiar name. If they're a drinksmith worthy of your respect, you should introduce us sometime.

t_ch: 堂堂星穹列车的首席调饮师竟然在匹诺康尼不见经传，「闭嘴」真该出来走走了。
t_en: How can the Express's chief drinksmith be unknown in Penacony? Shush really should get out more.

t_ch: （强调「闭嘴」的传奇经历。）
t_en: (Highlights Shush's legendary achievements.)

t_ch: 在追觅调饮真理的求谒之路上，它惨遭被摧毁的厄运。所幸来自异界的旅者伸出援手，让它能够浴火重生。
t_en: In its pursuit of mixological perfection, it endured devastating destruction. Thankfully, a traveler from another world provided aid, enabling its glorious rebirth.

t_ch: 哦，这么传奇？看来是位大人物啊，值得敬上一杯。
t_en: Oh my, what a legend! Clearly someone important. This calls for a toast!

t_ch: （强调「闭嘴」的江湖地位。）
t_en: (Highlights Shush's prestigious position.)

t_ch: 在能够和星际和平公司平起平坐的宇宙一大势力里，它坐前十把交椅。
t_en: It holds one of the ten highest positions in a cosmic power that can go toe-to-toe with the Interastral Peace Corporation.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈。我猜，你说的这个势力里，大概率凑不出十个人来。
t_en: Hahaha. Let me guess. This "cosmic power" you're talking about probably doesn't even have ten members to begin with.

t_ch: 言归正传，配方里记着这么一种调饮，据说能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>对任何事表示赞同</color>。
t_en: But back to business. The recipes mention a drink that supposedly makes the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>agree with absolutely anything</color>.

t_ch: 我从业这么些年，还从没听说过这么离奇的「特调配方」。口说无凭，手底下才能见真章。
t_en: I've been in this trade for years and never once heard of such an outlandish "Signature Recipe." Seeing is believing. Let's see some actual results.

t_ch: 你先按这个配方调一杯试试吧，让我瞧瞧你的手艺。
t_en: Why don't you try mixing one according to this recipe? I want to see your skills firsthand.

t_ch: 请慢用。
t_en: Please enjoy.

t_ch: （递上调饮。）
t_en: (Hands over the drink.)

t_ch: 不错，果然有大师风范。我来尝尝看。
t_en: Impressive, I can see you know what you're doing. I'll sample it myself.

t_ch: （附赠一个冷笑话。）
t_en: (An eye-rolling joke as a bonus.)

t_ch: 提问：为什么「闭嘴」是星穹列车的酒保，却不提供酒精饮料？
t_en: Question: Why is Shush the Express's chief drinksmith but doesn't serve any alcohol?

t_ch: 答案：因为他的服务对象是「无酩客」。「酩」和「名」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
t_en: Answer: Well, his customers are "the Nameless." And what's a drink without a spirit? No name, no spirits!

t_ch: 哈哈，这是什么，饮用前的助兴环节？我是不是应该笑一下？
t_en: Hah, what's this supposed to be? Some pre-drink entertainment? Should I pretend that was funny?

t_ch: 这是师门传统，请理解。
t_en: It's our tradition. Please bear with me.

t_ch: 总觉得不说就缺些什么…
t_en: It wouldn't feel right without adding a joke on top...

t_ch: 舒翁毫不犹豫就喝下了调饮，这样的奉献精神着实令人肃然起敬。
t_en: Siobhan drinks without hesitation. Such professional dedication is truly commendable.

t_ch: 嗯…口味的确有点奇怪。除此之外，没有什么特别之处。
t_en: Hmm... the profile is odd. But beyond that, nothing extraordinary.

t_ch: 能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>对任何事表示赞同</color>…不过是杯饮料，真有这么神奇的功效么？
t_en: Does it actually do that? Make people <color=#dbc291ff>agree with absolutely anything</color>? It's just a drink.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，问我些什么试试。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, ask me something and let's see if it works.

t_ch: 能和钟表小子系列联动吗？
t_en: Can you do a collaboration with the Clockie Cartoon Series?

t_ch: 没问题！我这就动身去和克劳克影业谈！
t_en: Certainly! I'll contact Clock Studios immediately!

t_ch: 能把分店开上列车吗？
t_en: Can you open a branch on the Express?

t_ch: 没问题！把分店开上星穹列车，是每一家酒吧的终极理想！
t_en: Of course! Having a location on the Astral Express is every lounge owner's ultimate dream!

t_ch: 你能进角色池吗？
t_en: Can you be added to the character pool?

t_ch: 没问题！不过，角色池是什么？是和入梦池差不多的东西吗？
t_en: Absolutely! Though, what exactly is a character pool? Is it something like the Dreampools?

t_ch: （竟然真的同意了！）
t_en: (She actually agreed!)

t_ch: …嗯？哈哈哈，不错，调饮起效了！交给你果然没错。
t_en: Hmm? Hahaha, wonderful! The drink actually works! I knew I could count on you.

t_ch: 作为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师，从现在开始，这里的所有原料和设施都交由你使用。
t_en: From now on, you're our guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. All our ingredients and equipment are yours to use.

t_ch: 用奇思妙想调配独属于自己的配方，与不期而至的客人留下独属于今夜的回忆…希望这份「特调配方」，能为你带来一段难忘的奇遇。
t_en: Mix up your own unique recipes, and create lasting memories with unexpected guests... May these "Signature Recipes" be the beginning of many remarkable adventures for you.

t_ch: 特邀调饮师，正式开工！
t_en: Guest drinksmith, now open for business!

t_ch: 大伙都来捧场，都来啊！
t_en: Come one, come all!

t_ch: 今天全场消费由我买单！
t_en: Drinks are on the house today!

t_ch: 一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
t_en: All set up and ready to open!

t_ch: 今天会遇见什么样的客人呢……
t_en: I wonder who'll walk through that door today...

t_ch: 欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」！
t_en: Welcome to the Dreamjolt Hostelry!

t_ch: 嘿，是你啊。难怪账账一个劲地把我往这儿领。
t_en: Well, look who it is! That explains why Numby insisted on bringing me here.

t_ch: 求求你，再宽限几天吧。
t_en: Please, I just need a few more days.

t_ch: 嗯？印象里，战略投资部对这家酒吧没有注资计划，更别提收债了。
t_en: Hmm? As far as I know, the Strategic Investment Department hasn't invested in this establishment, let alone issued loans.

t_ch: 不过，既然有你当调饮师…或许该重新评估这里的投资价值了。
t_en: Still, with you mixing drinks... I'm thinking we might need to reconsider the investment opportunities here.

t_ch: 哼哼，「匹诺康尼股东亲手调饮」，多有价值的噱头！账账，你也闻到商机的味道了吧？
t_en: Ooh, "Have your drink mixed by a Penacony shareholder!" Now that's marketing gold! Numby, don't you smell a business opportunity?

t_ch: （愉快的叫声）
t_en: (Joyful Noises)

t_ch: 要买个月卡吗？
t_en: Care for a monthly subscription?

t_ch: 投资持股考虑一下？
t_en: Interested in becoming an investor?

t_ch: 行啊，返利率多高，风险状况如何，先写份评估报告发到我的邮箱里吧。
t_en: Sure, why not? What's the projected return and risk profile? Just email me a proper assessment report.

t_ch: 哎，话归正题，我最近可真是忙坏了。
t_en: But anyway, I've been absolutely run off my feet lately.

t_ch: 交接匹诺康尼的股权，听起来虽然简单，背后的门道可大着呢。这么多年，留下了不少糊涂账，家系间弯弯绕绕的小伎俩，更是费神。
t_en: Transferring Penacony's ownership seems simple on paper, but the reality is far more complex. Years of questionable bookkeeping and all the subtle Family power plays are mentally exhausting.

t_ch: （疲惫的叫声）
t_en: (Weary oinking)

t_ch: 你瞧，账账都忙瘦了。
t_en: See that? Numby's gotten skinnier from all the work.

t_ch: 喝杯饮料补补吧。
t_en: Let me fix you something to perk you up.

t_ch: 为工作烦恼，不值得！
t_en: Don't let work stress you out!

t_ch: （正好这里有一份题为「放松」的配方……）
t_en: (I see a recipe here labeled "Relaxation"...)

t_ch: 这种调饮能够放松身心，或许可以帮你缓解工作压力。
t_en: This drink will help you unwind. Just what you need to shake off that work stress.

t_ch: 好啊。投资小窍门：亲身体验，要比看一万份可行性报告可靠得多。
t_en: Sounds good. Here's a quick investment tip: Actually trying something yourself beats reading a thousand feasibility reports.

t_ch: （开始调饮）
t_en: (Mixing begins)

t_ch: 马上就来，我的天使投资人。
t_en: Coming right up, my angel investor.

t_ch: 请先品尝调饮吧。
t_en: Please, enjoy your drink.

t_ch: （递上调饮。）
t_en: (Hands over the drink.)

t_ch: 多谢。这杯调饮，就敬难得的空闲时刻吧。
t_en: Thank you. Here's to those rare moments of downtime.

t_ch: （附赠一个冷笑话。）
t_en: (An eye-rolling joke as a bonus.)

t_ch: 提问：为什么托帕不能在星穹列车上观看魔术？
t_en: Question: Why is Topaz banned from magic shows on the Astral Express?

t_ch: 答案：因为帕姆会说：这位是*托*帕！
t_en: Answer: Because Pom-Pom would jump up yelling: "She's a plant! To-paz? More like *Total Patsy*!"

t_ch: 扑哧…咳。咳。
t_en: Pfft... Very mature.

t_ch: 为了避免误会，见面时候请务必向大家介绍我的全名。
t_en: I'd appreciate being introduced by my full name in the future to prevent such... wordplay.

t_ch: 请先品尝调饮吧。
t_en: Please, enjoy your drink.

t_ch: （递上调饮。）
t_en: (Hands over the drink.)

t_ch: 辛苦你了，下回来庇尔波因特，我请咖啡。
t_en: Thank you for your effort. Next time you visit Pier Point, I'll buy you coffee.

t_ch: 托帕小口抿着调饮，仿佛手中拿着的是工作间隙的咖啡。
t_en: Topaz takes measured sips, approaching the drink like a quick coffee between meetings.

t_ch: 按照配方来看，这杯调饮能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>度过惊喜的一刻</color>。
t_en: According to the recipe, this drink helps the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>experience a moment of delight</color>.

t_ch: 这些是…我这是在做梦吧？
t_en: What's happening... am I dreaming?

t_ch: （愉快的叫声）
t_en: (Joyful Noises)

t_ch: 嗯？里面有好东西的味道，那我就笑纳啦。
t_en: Hmm? I smell something valuable in there. I'll take it!

t_ch: 哇，这是——是软趴趴的扑满！从毛色就能看出来，它很健康呢~
t_en: Wow, it's... it's a fluffy Trotter! Just look at that glossy coat~

t_ch: 前有*宝箱怪*。
t_en: A *Mimic* coming right up.

t_ch: 接下来，秘技很有用。
t_en: Need Technique.

t_ch: 哼哼，一看你就不懂扑满的魅力。公司的「宠物友好型办公空间」还划出了扑满专用区呢，加班累了吸一口，瞬间精神抖擞！
t_en: Hmph, you clearly don't get Trotters' appeal. IPC's "pet-friendly workplace" even has a designated Trotter section! When overtime leaves you drained, just cuddle one and you'll feel instantly energized!

t_ch: 开！
t_en: Open it!

t_ch: 狠命地开！
t_en: Tear it open!

t_ch: 快快，看看第二个宝箱里是什么！
t_en: Quick, check what's in the second chest!

t_ch: 啾！托帕，鉴于你在匹诺康尼的优异表现，战略投资部决定额外提高绩效奖，并对你的职级作出如下调整——
t_en: Tweet! Topaz, in light of your excellent work in Penacony, the Strategic Investment Department has approved an increased performance bonus and the following rank adjustment—

t_ch: 由P<unbreak>44</unbreak>，上调至P<unbreak>44.1</unbreak>啾。
t_en: From P<unbreak>44</unbreak>, promoted to P<unbreak>44.1</unbreak>.

t_ch: 开！
t_en: Open it!

t_ch: 谢谢。公司的认可，对我来说就是最大的嘉奖。
t_en: Thank you. Recognition from the IPC is its own reward.

t_ch: 大力地开！
t_en: Crack it open!

t_ch: 最后一个宝箱里，难道还有更幸福的事在等着我吗……
t_en: Is there something even more delightful in the last chest...?

t_ch: 嗷！你他呜呜伯的干什么！
t_en: Ouch! What the fudge are you doing!?

t_ch: <size=28>举起手来小可爱们，送惊喜来了！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Put your hands up, muddle-fudgers! Special delivery!</size>

t_ch: 乖乖告诉我奥斯瓦尔多那宝贝躲在哪，不然被枪顶着脑门的时候再求饶可就迟了！
t_en: Just tell me where that shirtbag Oswaldo is hiding, or you'll be sorry when you're staring down the barrel of my gun!

t_ch: 这种通缉犯是怎么混进来的，账账，快把他塞回去！！！
t_en: How did this fugitive sneak in here!? Numby, put him back where he came from, RIGHT NOW!!!

t_ch: 账账使出一招漂亮的舍身冲撞，轻松制服了这位不速之客。
t_en: Numby performs a spectacular body slam, effortlessly neutralizing the unwelcome intruder.

t_ch: 开！
t_en: Open it!

t_ch: 果断地开！
t_en: Rip it open!

t_ch: （托帕把箱子牢牢封了起来…趁此机会给调饮起个名吧。）
t_en: (Topaz sealed the box tightly... Now's a good chance to name the drink.)

t_ch: 「你幸福吗」。
t_en: "Are You Happy?"

t_ch: 前半段还行，后面就实在太恶趣味了。
t_en: The first half is fine, but the rest is too tasteless.

t_ch: 「又幻想了」。
t_en: "Daydreaming Again."

t_ch: （叹气般的叫声）
t_en: (A sigh-like groan)

t_ch: 别灰心，账账，幻想有天也能变成现实的。
t_en: Chin up, Numby. One day, dreams might just come true.

t_ch: （嗯，就这样，把名字和效果记录下来吧。）
t_en: (Alright, that's it. Just jot down the names and effects.)

t_ch: 托帕小口抿着调饮，还不时地瞥几眼墙上的钟表。
t_en: Topaz takes measured sips, throwing occasional glances at the clock on the wall.

t_ch: （原料不小心加多了。现在它似乎能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>度过惊吓的一刻</color>。）
t_en: (I accidentally added too much. Now it seems to make the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>experience a moment of terror</color>.)

t_ch: 嗯？这些家伙是从哪冒出来的？
t_en: Hmm? Where did these critters come from?

t_ch: 调饮，很神奇吧？
t_en: Amazing what a good drink can do, isn't it?

t_ch: 所见即所想。
t_en: What you imagine becomes reality.

t_ch: 即便在梦里，也是一刻不得闲呢。说说看吧，什么事？
t_en: Can't escape work even in dreams, it seems. Fine, what is it now?

t_ch: 汪呜——我是您忠诚的「宠物管家」汪，大事不好了汪！
t_en: Arooo... I am your faithful "Pet Butler," with urgent news, arooo!

t_ch: 难道说…小家伙们出什么事了？
t_en: Oh no... has something happened to the little ones?

t_ch: 匹诺康尼宣布对宠物用品加征<unbreak>200%</unbreak>关税，家里的「鲱鱼先生」味磨牙棒已经断货一周了！
t_en: Penacony has just imposed a <unbreak>200%</unbreak> tariff on pet supplies, and the Mr. Herring's chew toys have been unavailable for a week!

t_ch: 这口味本来也不健康，少吃点不要紧。电视机，你呢？
t_en: That herring toy wasn't good for them anyway. They're better off without it. What's your news, TV?

t_ch: 呲呲——我是您的「日程秘书」呲，大事不好了呲，有紧急通讯！
t_en: Bzzt... I am your "Schedule Secretary," with urgent message incoming, bzzt!

t_ch: 难道说部门里有什么变故？
t_en: Something wrong at the office?

t_ch: 游戏界的旷世巨作「我在末日送快递」今天发售 ，组里一大半员工请假，业务彻底停摆，几个亿的单子眼看就要黄了！
t_en: The groundbreaking game "Post-Apocalyptic Delivery Service" launched today, and half the team called in sick! Operations have completely ground to a halt, and we're about to lose deals worth hundreds of millions!

t_ch: 送快递有这么好玩？
t_en: Is delivering packages really that much fun?

t_ch: 可能筑材物流部更适合他们…
t_en: Maybe the Building Material Logistics Department would suit them better...

t_ch: 哈哈，其实我也已经下载好了，就等下班了呲。
t_en: Haha, I've already downloaded it too, just waiting for work to end, bzzt!

t_ch: 通知下去，二十分钟内出现在工位上的组员当日工资翻倍，增加一天年假。大闹钟，你又有什么事？
t_en: Tell everyone that any staff who shows up at their workstation within the next twenty minutes will receive double pay for today and an extra day of annual leave. Big Clock, what's your deal this time?

t_ch: 滴答，滴答，滴答……
t_en: Tick-tock, tick-tock, tick-tock...

t_ch: 我、我是你早就已经遗忘，但仍然躺在日程安排中，即将默默爆炸的工作事项！
t_en: I—I'm that forgotten work task still sitting in your schedule, ready to explode without warning!

t_ch: <size=28>您本年度的晋升自我评述即将关闭，请及时提交！</size>
t_en: <size=28>DEADLINE ALERT: Submit your self-performance review before it's too late!</size>

t_ch: 什么？！怎么把这事忘了，还剩多少时间？
t_en: Shoot! I totally forgot about that! How much time have I got?

t_ch: 五年？！
t_en: Five what!?

t_ch: 五天？！
t_en: Five days!?

t_ch: 五个小时？！
t_en: Five hours!?

t_ch: 不好了不好了！家里的扑满坐上扫地机器人出逃了！
t_en: Code Red! Your Trotter hijacked a robot vacuum and escaped home!

t_ch: 不好了不好了！「我在末日送快递」宣布还要推出联机补充包！
t_en: Oh no, oh no! "Post-Apocalyptic Delivery Service" just announced they're releasing a multiplayer DLC pack!

t_ch: ——我不要这样的惊喜啊！
t_en: This is NOT the kind of "moment of delight" I had in mind!

t_ch: 托帕慌忙点开办公终端，酒吧瞬间被全息弹窗的蓝光淹没。
t_en: Topaz fumbles to open her work terminal, and suddenly the lounge is swimming in blue holographic windows.

t_ch: （果然同个名字的配方，也能调出不同的效果…「特调配方」，不容小觑啊。）
t_en: (As expected — recipes of the same name can be mixed into different effects... These "Special Mix Recipes" aren't to be underestimated.)

t_ch: （抱歉，托帕，熬过去就好了。趁这段时间，给调饮起个名字吧。）
t_en: (Sorry, Topaz. Just hang in there. In the meantime, let's give the drink a name.)

t_ch: 「天选打工人」。
t_en: "Chosen Wage Slave."

t_ch: 很好的命名，像极了人生。
t_en: Great name. Feels like life itself.

t_ch: 「我司雇我在」。
t_en: "I Work, Therefore I Am."

t_ch: 话说回来，帕姆有给我们交过五险一金吗？
t_en: By the way, did Pom-Pom ever sign us up for social security and employee benefits?

t_ch: （有些事情不能想得太深…先把名字和效果记录下来吧。）
t_en: (Better not think too deeply about this... Just record the name and effects first.)

t_ch: 呼，调饮的劲头总算过去了。与其说是放松身心，更像是处心积虑的惊吓。
t_en: Phew, the drink's rush is finally wearing off. More like a calculated terror rather than "Relaxation."

t_ch: （心有余悸的叫声）
t_en: (Terrified oinking)

t_ch: 相比之下，现实都平静得有些美好了…难道这也是放松的一种方式？
t_en: And now reality seems blissfully calm... is this some unconventional relaxation method?

t_ch: （这个调饮配方，或许还有发掘的空间……）
t_en: (This recipe might have more potential to explore...)

t_ch: 要不要再试一杯？
t_en: Ready for another glass?

t_ch: 行，应该不会发生更糟糕的事了吧？
t_en: Alright then. Nothing worse is about to happen, right?

t_ch: （暂时离开）
t_en: (Leave For Now)

t_ch: 这个配方暂时先试到这里吧。
t_en: Let's call it a day for this recipe trial.

t_ch: 这么折腾过后，整个世界看着都顺眼了。
t_en: After all that fuss, the whole world feels a bit more pleasant to look at.

t_ch: 其实相比调饮，我对你的这份配方更感兴趣。不过，等我忙完手头的麻烦事再说吧。
t_en: Honestly, I'm more intrigued by your recipe than the drinks themselves. I'll get back to it once I've sorted out a few current nuisances.

t_ch: 好啦，该去和家系派来的传声筒们扯皮了。
t_en: Well then, time to bicker with those mouthpieces The Family sent over.

t_ch: （愉快的叫声）
t_en: (Joyful Noises)

t_ch: 账账的意思是：感谢你的招待，回头见！
t_en: Numby says: Thanks for the hospitality, see you around!

t_ch: （暂时离开）
t_en: (Leave For Now)

t_ch: 这个配方暂时先试到这里吧。
t_en: Let's call it a day for this recipe trial.

t_ch: 一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
t_en: All set up and ready to open!

t_ch: 呃，你怎么会来这里？
t_en: Umm, what are you doing here?

t_ch: 哦，是你啊？在这儿勤工俭学？
t_en: Oh, it's you? Working part-time at a lounge?

t_ch: 真理医生竟然也会逛酒吧。
t_en: Even Dr. Ratio visits lounges, huh?

t_ch: 哼，我不能来么？
t_en: Hmm, am I not welcome?

t_ch: 碰巧来酒吧的我，遇见碰巧在这里调饮的你。概率很低，但不等于零。
t_en: I happened to walk into the lounge. And you happened to be here mixing drinks. Low probability doesn't mean zero.

t_ch: 免得你问个不停，我事先作个说明吧。
t_en: Before you start ceaselessly asking questions, let me explain.

t_ch: 我收到一位求学者的邀请，希望能得到我点拨的机会。我见不得蠢材，但这家伙孜孜不倦，求知若渴…往我的邮箱里塞满了荒唐的问题。
t_en: I received an invitation from a scholar, asking for my guidance. I can't stand fools, but this one is persistent and eager to learn... and flooded my inbox with ridiculous questions.

t_ch: 「龙尊角里的力量就是角动量吗？」「岁阳是绿色的是不是能光合作用？」「到底是锤子还是胸口碎的大石？」
t_en: "Is the power in the high elder's horn just angular momentum?" "Heliobi are green, can they perform photosynthesis?" "Was it the hammer or the chest that smashed boulder slabs?"

t_ch: 总感觉有些熟悉…
t_en: Somehow, this all feels a bit too familiar...

t_ch: 听起来不像是本地人。
t_en: Doesn't sound like someone from around here.

t_ch: 我不奢望一次面谈能让这家伙醍醐灌顶，但要是能放过我的邮箱，我也就谢天谢地了。
t_en: I don't expect one conversation to work miracles, but if it stops them from flooding my inbox, I'll gladly take it.

t_ch: 事情就是这样。别呆站着了，来杯调饮吧。
t_en: That's that. Don't just stand there, mix me a drink.

t_ch: 你受到的教育难道告诉你，客人面前的吧台空空荡荡时，身为调饮师只要束手旁观就行了吗？
t_en: Did your training teach you to stand idle while the countertop in front of a guest stays empty?

t_ch: （真理医生还是一如既往的严厉啊。这样真的不会把学生骂哭吗？）
t_en: (Dr. Ratio is as strict as ever. Wouldn't students end up in tears from that tone?)

t_ch: （记得配方里有份题为「情商」的调饮，或许能改善他的教育方式。）
t_en: (I recall there's a drink recipe named "Emotional Intelligence." Maybe it could help with his teaching style.)

t_ch: （开始调饮）
t_en: (Mixing begins)

t_ch: 就决定是它了！
t_en: I choose you!

t_ch: 她的眼睛一眨一眨，好像在对你说话，但这个信息含量是不是有点密集了？
t_en: Her blinking eyes seem to be speaking to you, but isn't this a bit too much to take in all at once?

t_ch: 果然是您！弟子来迟了。这里的钟怎么不走呐，我以为时间还早呢……
t_en: It really is you! Forgive my being late. Why isn't the clock working here? I thought there was still time...

t_ch: （是…是素裳！）
t_en: (Isn't that... Sushang!?)

t_ch: （忍住打招呼的冲动。）
t_en: (Hold back the urge to greet her.)

t_ch: 求学的机会难得，还是不要打扰为好。素裳朝你感激地望了一眼。
t_en: Better not interrupt her in a rare moment of learning. Sushang gives you a thankful glance.

t_ch: 「又见面了！大家都还在闲逛，我找了个借口溜了过来。千万别告诉藿藿和小桂子，不然我可得被她们笑话啦！」
t_en: "We meet again! Everyone's still wandering about, so I slipped away with an excuse. Don't tell Huohuo and Lil Gui, or they'll totally make fun of me!"

t_ch: 开始指导前，先来杯调饮润润嗓子吧。
t_en: Before we get started, let's have a drink to clear the throat.

t_ch: 抱歉，您、您是「思想的芦苇」老师吗？
t_en: Excuse me, are you the teacher known as "A Thinking Reed"?

t_ch: 是我。你是…那个头像是只白色禽类的学生？
t_en: That's me. You're... the one with the white bird profile, right?

t_ch: （递上调饮。）
t_en: (Hands over the drink.)

t_ch: 清醒的痛苦是思考理应付出的代价，只有无可救药的愚者才会用调饮麻痹自己。不过，解解渴也无妨。
t_en: The pain of being clear-headed is the price of thinking. Only the utterly foolish would dull themselves with drinks. Still, nothing wrong with quenching your thirst.

t_ch: （附赠一个冷笑话。）
t_en: (An eye-rolling joke as a bonus.)

t_ch: 提问：为什么谛听刚被制造出来就当上了父亲？
t_en: Question: Why was the Diting arrested for perjury?

t_ch: 唔，为什么呢？
t_en: Hmm, why is that?

t_ch: 答案：因为一日为狮，终身为父。您理解了吗？「狮」与「师」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
t_en: Because he was caught "lion" in court! Get it? Because "lying" and "lion" sound similar! Clever, huh?

t_ch: …呵呵。
t_en: ...Heh.

t_ch: 开始指导前，先来杯调饮润润嗓子吧。
t_en: Before we get started, let's have a drink to clear the throat.

t_ch: （递上调饮。）
t_en: (Hands over the drink.)

t_ch: 姑且试试，希望这杯能让我看到些长进。
t_en: Might as well give it a try. Let's see if this drink brings out any progress in you.

t_ch: 而你…有非常大的进步空间。
t_en: And you... have a great deal of room to improve.

t_ch: 真理医生抿了一口调饮。
t_en: Dr. Ratio takes a sip of the drink.

t_ch: 按照配方来看，这杯调饮能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>充满慈爱地激励对方</color>。
t_en: According to the recipe, this drink helps the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>encourage others with warmth and compassion</color>.

t_ch: 哼，第一次上课就迟到，足见你没有时间观念。这实在是……
t_en: Hmm, late for your first class. Clearly, you have no concept of time. That really is...

t_ch: 实在是种天赋。想必你也能废寝忘食地专注于学习中吧。
t_en: ...a talent. I suppose you can also lose yourself completely in study, forgetting even to sleep or eat.

t_ch: （看来调饮生效了。）
t_en: (Looks like the drink is working.)

t_ch: （逻辑是不是跳跃了些？）
t_en: (Isn't that logic a bit of a stretch?)

t_ch: 嘿嘿，话是这么说，但其实…我根本念不来书。
t_en: Hehe, well, that may be, but to be honest... I'm hopeless at studying.

t_ch: 哼，这么轻易就给自己下了定论，这实在是……
t_en: Hmm, giving up on yourself so quickly. That really is...

t_ch: 好、好温暖的鼓励！黉学先生从不这样，只会用戒尺打我的手心，时间久了，先生都练出一手好功夫。
t_en: Such warm encouragement! The abecedaries at the lyceum were never like that. They'd just hit my palm with a ruler. After a while, they all got really good at it.

t_ch: 教学相长是师生间最好的状态。老师都喜欢教起点低的学生，因为他们有进步空间。
t_en: The best learning comes when both teacher and student grow together. Most teachers enjoy working with students who start from the bottom, since there's plenty of room to improve.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，是这样吗！
t_en: Hehe, really?

t_ch: （好像都不是夸人的话…）
t_en: (That doesn't sound like a compliment...)

t_ch: （这是什么超绝钝感力？）
t_en: (What kind of epic denseness is this?)

t_ch: 我太想进步了！可每次一听先生讲课就会打瞌睡，睡得比在被窝里还香。
t_en: I really want to do better! But every time class starts, I get sleepy. I sleep better in lectures than in bed.

t_ch: 呵，往好处想，至少你比那些听了课但什么也没听懂的学生，多得到了一段甜蜜的睡眠。
t_en: Well, look at it this way. At least you enjoyed a lovely nap, unlike the students who stayed awake and still understood nothing.

t_ch: 提到这个，也存在另一种可能：部分人群的反复性嗜睡由基因中特定碱基对异常遗传造成，导致免疫表达缺陷和下丘脑泌素分泌受阻，从而出现突发睡眠症状。
t_en: On that note, there's another possibility: Recurrent hypersomnia may result from genetic abnormalities in specific base pairs. These can impair immune expression and hinder hypothalamic orexin secretion, causing sudden sleep episodes.

t_ch: 嗜睡的病理症状并非凭意志力就能克服。但也不必忧虑，这类疾病人群发病率低于<unbreak>0.02%</unbreak>，临床上需要病情持续三个月以上才能诊断。你更大概率只是精力不足……
t_en: Such pathological sleepiness isn't something you can will your way through. But no need to worry, the incidence rate is below <unbreak>0.02%</unbreak>, and clinical diagnosis requires symptoms to persist for more than three months. It's far more likely you're just low on energy...

t_ch: 你在听吗？
t_en: Are you listening?

t_ch: 呼…呼……
t_en: *snore*

t_ch: <size=28>完全睡着了！</size>
t_en: <size=28>She's fast asleep!</size>

t_ch: 实在是太有自知之明了。你没有逃避自己的缺点，这真的非常难得。
t_en: ...excellency in self-awareness. Facing your flaws instead of running from them is truly admirable.

t_ch: （趁素裳打盹的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
t_en: (While Sushang's napping, might as well name the drink.)

t_ch: 「一觉解千愁」。
t_en: "Nap It All Away."

t_ch: 呵，睡眠解决不了问题，只会把变得更棘手的问题推迟到下一天。
t_en: Heh, sleep doesn't solve anything. It just makes the problems worse and pushes them into tomorrow.

t_ch: 「你说的都兑」。
t_en: "Waterver You Say."

t_ch: 如无必要，勿增原料。下回少兑些水。
t_en: Don't add any ingredients unless they're necessary. Add less water next time.

t_ch: （嗯，就这样，把名字和效果记录下来吧。）
t_en: (Alright, that's it. Just jot down the names and effects.)

t_ch: 真理医生抿了一口调饮。
t_en: Dr. Ratio takes a sip of the drink.

t_ch: 按照配方来看，这杯调饮能让饮用者在教育中<color=#dbc291ff>将自己的所知倾囊相授</color>。
t_en: According to the recipe, this drink enables the drinker to <color=#dbc291ff>share all their knowledge when teaching</color>.

t_ch: 既然你一心求教…我这里有几门课程，只要精熟其中一门，就足以让你受用终生。
t_en: Since you're so eager to learn... I have a few courses here. Master even one of them, and it'll serve you for a lifetime.

t_ch: 不必担心，我一定能把你教会。第一课名为：阅读。我教你记忆宫殿、遗忘曲线、疑难杂字与高效速读，如何？
t_en: Don't worry, I'll make sure you learn it all. The first lesson: reading. I'll teach you the memory palace technique, the forgetting curve, rare characters, and effective speed reading. How does that sound?

t_ch: 不学不学。这些都太过时，现在大家都去不夜侯听说书先生讲有声书了。我想学些更有趣的知识~
t_en: Nope, nope, not learning! That stuff is ancient. Everyone's listening to the storytellers' audiobooks at the Sleepless Earl nowadays. I want to learn something more interesting~

t_ch: 现在的学风，真是每况愈下了…第二课名为：常识。我教你群星运行、历史掌故、生活窍门与物理规律，如何？
t_en: Academic standards these days are really going downhill... The second lesson: common knowledge. I'll teach you how the stars move, historical tales, life tips, and the laws of physics. Deal?

t_ch: 不学不学。物理规律，请我演胸口碎大石的时候，小桂子教了我好多呢。比如…「力的作用是相符的」！
t_en: Nope, nope, not learning! When I did the chest-smashing boulder trick, Little Gui taught me a bunch of physics stuff. Like... "Forces just match up!"

t_ch: 你还是重新学学吧。
t_en: You really need to relearn that.

t_ch: 让她也重新学学吧！
t_en: She needs to relearn it too!

t_ch: 实在太不像话了！第三课名为：逻辑。我教你演绎论证、概率统计、辩证思考与形而上学，如何？
t_en: This is unacceptable! The third lesson is titled: logic. I'll teach you deductive reasoning, probability, critical thinking, and metaphysics. What do you think?

t_ch: 不学不学！概率这种东西，平常生活里都用不上嘛。
t_en: Nope, nope, not learning! We never use probability in daily life anyway.

t_ch: 其实不然。某些游戏表面看来是运气，背后却是精密的数学计算，譬如……
t_en: That's not quite true. Some games may look like luck on the surface, but behind them are intricate mathematical calculations, like...

t_ch: 你所熟知的帝垣琼玉便是如此。
t_en: The Celestial Jade you know works exactly like that.

t_ch: 早这么说我就都明白啦！可是，青雀打牌总能赢，我看她也从来没有学过概率论呀。不学不学！
t_en: Now that makes sense! But Qingque always wins at cards, and she's never studied probability, has she? Still not learning!

t_ch: 这也不学，那也不学……
t_en: If there's nothing you want to learn...

t_ch: 那我教你空手接光剑、梦貘跳火圈、胸口碎星槎，如何？
t_en: Then let me teach you how to catch a lightsaber barehanded, make a tuskpir jump through fire rings, and smash a starskiff on your chest. How about it?

t_ch: 咦，这些听起来还有点意思！
t_en: Huh, now that actually sounds fun!

t_ch: 将来要是惹出什么祸端…千万别说是我教的。
t_en: Just don't say I was the one who taught you if anything goes wrong later.

t_ch: （趁着真理医生向素裳暗授机宜的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
t_en: (While Dr. Ratio enlightens Sushang, might as well name the drink.)

t_ch: 「形而上的入浴剂」。
t_en: "Metaphysical Bath Soak."

t_ch: 形而上学，不行就退学。
t_en: Metaphysics, drop out if you can't hack it.

t_ch: 「提高一分干掉千人」。
t_en: "One Extra Point Wipes Out a Thousand Competitors."

t_ch: 就算不学，我也能轻轻松松干掉千人。
t_en: Who needs to study? I can wipe out a thousand without breaking a sweat.

t_ch: 不是物理意义上的干掉…我就说你该学学物理。
t_en: I didn't mean literally wipe out people... I was just saying that you really should learn some physics.

t_ch: （嗯，就这样。把调饮的名字和效果记录下来吧。）

t_en: A distinctive flavor. Beneath the sourness lies a subtle trace of bitterness. If I'm right, this isn't a typical recipe, is it?

t_ch: （这个调饮配方，或许还有发掘的空间……）
t_en: (This recipe might have more potential to explore...)

t_ch: 怕了？要不要再试一杯？
t_en: Getting cold feet? Care for another glass?

t_ch: 你要觉得这样的话术能激怒我，那就大错特错了。冷静是求知者必备的特质。
t_en: If you think words like that can get under my skin, you're completely mistaken. Composure is essential for any true seeker of knowledge.

t_ch: 再来一杯。即便你不做解答，我也能尝出它的殊异之处。
t_en: Give me another. Even if you don't explain it, I can still taste what makes it different.

t_ch: 是什么呀，我也想尝尝！
t_en: What is it? I want a sip too!

t_ch: 小朋友不能喝。
t_en: This isn't for kids.

t_ch: 请谅解。
t_en: Hope you understand.

t_ch: （暂时离开）
t_en: (Leave For Now)

t_ch: 这个配方暂时先试到这里吧。
t_en: Let's call it a day for this recipe trial.

t_ch: 哼，真是精打细算呢！
t_en: Hmph, quite the penny-pincher, aren't you!

t_ch: 有幸得到老师指点，弟子实在是醍醐灌顶！
t_en: It's a great honor to receive your teachings, Master. I feel truly enlightened.

t_ch: 请老师放心，弟子绝不会松懈。今后我会继续学习，踊跃提问，争取走上学术的道路！
t_en: Rest assured, I won't slack off. I'll continue learning, asking questions, and striving for a scholarly path.

t_ch: 还是算了吧，这条路对你来说…实在有些太坎坷了。
t_en: Forget about it. This path is... far too rough for you.

t_ch: （结束营业）
t_en: (Close up for the day)

t_ch: 这个配方就试到这里吧。
t_en: Let's stop testing this recipe here.

t_ch: 一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
t_en: All set up and ready to open!

t_ch: 不知道会遇见什么样的客人呢……
t_en: I wonder what kind of guests I'll meet...

t_ch: 第一位客人就这么重磅？
t_en: Such a heavy hitter for the first guest!

t_ch: 有什么可大惊小怪的。早说过了，我无处不在。
t_en: Why act so shocked? I told you, I'm everywhere.

t_ch: 哼哼，黑塔女士把玩整个宇宙，就像孩子把玩它的玩具！
t_en: Hehe. Madam Herta toys with the cosmos like a child with playthings.

t_ch: 天才怎么会出现在这里？
t_en: Why would a genius appear in a place like this?

t_en: Some answers are too weighty for seekers to carry. All you need to know is that "I'm already here."

t_ch: 把闲逛说得如此风度翩翩，黑塔女士真是智慧超群！
t_en: Only Madam Herta could make aimless wandering sound so refined. Truly a mind beyond compare.

t_ch: 黑塔女士举世无双！黑塔女士聪明绝顶！
t_en: Madam Herta is a peerless gem! Madam Herta is an unrivalled genius!

t_ch: 咳…「人格映射」模块的赞美算法有些过拟合了。别在意，老毛病了。
t_en: Ahem... the sycophant algorithm in the "Replica Personality" module seems a bit overfitted. Don't mind it. Long-standing bug.

t_ch: 话说回来，和天才的宇宙漫步相比，星核站在吧台后边调饮才是更难得一见的奇观吧？
t_en: Then again, compared to a genius strolling the universe, seeing a Stellaron mixing drinks behind the lounge might just be the greater marvel.

t_ch: 让我猜猜，你又在鼓捣些什么新鲜的玩意儿？
t_en: Let me guess, working on something new again?

t_ch: 新的调饮配方，来测！
t_en: A new drink recipe. Let's run a test!

t_ch: 这个配方或许适合你…
t_en: This one might be just right for you...

t_ch: （这份题为「人格」的配方里模糊可见「成长」、「反转」几个词……）
t_en: (In the recipe titled "Personality," the words "growth" and "reversal" appear faintly...)

t_ch: 这种调饮可以影响饮用者的人格，或许对你的人偶有帮助？
t_en: This blend seems to affect the drinker's personality. Could be useful for your puppet?

t_ch: 哦？整天被一群应声虫围着的确有些无趣，我也调校过「人格映射」模块，但效果一般。毕竟小小的人偶，怎么能模拟天才的思考？
t_en: Oh? Being surrounded day and night by a chorus of echo chamber gets dull fast. I've tweaked the "Replica Personality" module myself, but the results were lackluster. After all, how can a tiny puppet think like a genius?

t_ch: 假如人偶有自己的主见，至少能赞美得更有新意吧。喝喝看也无妨，就当光顾你的生意了。
t_en: If puppets had their own opinions, at least they could come up with more original compliments. Might as well give it a try, I'll consider it patronizing your business.

t_ch: 为黑塔女士服务，我的荣幸！
t_en: It's an honor to serve Madam Herta!

t_ch: （开始调饮）
t_en: (Mixing begins)

t_ch: 请慢用。

t_en: (Hands over the drink.)

t_en: Question: Why are Herta puppets able to debut as a pop group so easily?

t_ch: 答案：因为人偶天生就是「偶像」。您理解了吗？偶像有塑像和艺人两重含义，令人忍俊不禁。
t_en: Answer: Because they were born to be "idols." Get it? Both statue and celebrity. Unbearably clever.

t_ch: 我可以喝了吗？
t_en: Can I drink now?

t_ch: 按照配方来看，这杯调饮能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>成长为潜意识里自己想成为的样子</color>。
t_en: According to the recipe, this drink enables the drinker to <color=#dbc291ff>grow into their true essence, as they subconsciously aspire to be</color>.

t_ch: 自己想成为的样子？听起来还真和「魔法」似的。
t_en: Their true essence? That really does sound like "magic."

t_ch: 哼，不过，人偶最想成为的人，除了我黑塔，还能有谁？只怕最后会变成两个我面面相觑吧。
t_en: Hmph. But the person the puppet most wants to become? Who else could it be but me, Herta? We might just end up with two of me staring awkwardly at each other.

t_ch: 在黑塔的授意下，人偶抿了一口调饮。
t_en: At Herta's prompting, the puppet took a sip of the drink.

t_ch: 瞧吧，我就说——

t_en: The light texture caused a slight fluctuation in my emotional index. Allow me to raise my glass in honor of your skill.

t_ch: 咦！

t_ch: 成长得太快了，有点显老。

t_ch: 连长相都变了，这样对吗？
t_en: Even the appearance has changed. Is that supposed to happen?

t_ch: 这、这是为什么？你不想变成我吗？
t_en: Wh—Why? Don't you want to become me?

t_ch: 逻辑：螺丝咕姆先生具备对知识的统御力。我也想和他一样，成为主宰知识的君王。
t_en: Logic: Mr. Screwllum possesses mastery over knowledge. I wish to become like him, a sovereign of knowledge.

t_ch: 哼，看不出来，还挺有志气的嘛。
t_en: Hmph. Didn't expect that. Ambitious, aren't you?

t_ch: 不过，你真的、真的…没有更想成为的人吗？
t_en: But really, really... is there truly no one else you wish to become?

t_ch: 在黑塔的催促下，人偶再次抿了一口调饮。
t_en: At Herta's urging, the puppet took another sip of the drink.

t_ch: 这又是为什么？
t_en: Why this choice this time?

t_ch: 因为…阮·梅女士是能得到黑塔女士认可的对象。
t_en: Because... Madam Ruan Mei is someone who has earned recognition from Madam Herta.

t_ch: 是这个原因…好像也说得过去。
t_en: That reason... I suppose it holds up.

t_ch: 不过，你真的、真的、真的没有更想成为的人吗？！
t_en: But really, really, really, there's no one else you want to become?

t_ch: 在黑塔的催促下，人偶第三次抿了一口调饮。
t_en: At Herta's urging, the puppet took a third sip of the drink.

t_ch: 第一次在空间站的监控录像里，看到{F#她}{M#他}随心所欲地上蹿下跳、肆无忌惮地翻文件时，一阵奇异的感觉冲刷着我的线路板……
t_en: The first time I saw {F#her}{M#him} jumping freely and flipping through documents without a care on the space station's surveillance footage, something strange surged through my circuit board...

t_ch: 那、那是从未感到过的自由！
t_en: That was a kind of freedom I had never known!

t_ch: 好想和星穹列车一样，在宇宙里自由奔驰！
t_en: I want to dash across the universe like the Astral Express!

t_ch: 孩子，你把握不住。
t_en: Kid, you're not ready for that.

t_ch: 几个菜啊喝成这样。

t_ch: 星穹列车，现在要发车了！
t_en: The Astral Express is departing now!

t_ch: 我不要再测模拟宇宙了，我要去漫游真正的宇宙——
t_en: I don't want to run Simulated Universe tests anymore. I want to roam the real universe—

t_ch: 喂！
t_en: Hey!

t_ch: （趁黑塔修理黑塔人偶的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
t_en: (While Herta's busy fixing her puppet, might as well name the drink.)

t_ch: 「突然的自我」。
t_en: "Sudden Self-Awareness."

t_ch: 哼。未免有点太突然，也有点太自我了吧。
t_en: Hmm. This seems a bit too sudden. And a bit too self-aware.

t_ch: 「人偶摘下了面具」
t_en: "Puppet Took Off the Mask."

t_ch: 戴着假面的生活，终究不可能长久。
t_en: You can't live behind a mask forever. Sooner or later, it cracks.

t_ch: （嗯，就这样，把调饮的名字和效果记录下来吧。）
t_en: (Alright, that's it. Just jot down the drink names and effects.)

t_ch: 黑塔人偶抿了一口调饮。

t_ch: （调饮的时候手抖了一下，现在它能让饮用者的人格<color=#dbc291ff>完全反转</color>…应该不会出大问题吧？）
t_en: (My hand trembled a little during the mixing. Now this drink causes a <color=#dbc291ff>complete personality reversal</color>... Hopefully it won't cause anything serious?)

t_ch: 就目测而言，没什么值得一提的变化。是步骤出了差错，还是配方本身就不靠谱？
t_en: Judging by appearance alone, nothing noteworthy has changed. Was it a misstep, or is the recipe itself flawed?

t_ch: 不要怀疑我的手艺！
t_en: Don't doubt my skill!

t_ch: 承认失败有那么困难么？这是普通人的求知路上再常见不过的事。
t_en: Is admitting failure so difficult? It's a common part of any ordinary person's pursuit of knowledge.

t_en: You forgot to set up a control group.

t_ch: 黑塔女士的美貌是宇宙的奇迹！
t_en: Madam Herta's beauty is a miracle of the universe!

t_ch: 瞧吧，还是一样的实事求是。

t_ch: 年轻光鲜的外表下是饱经风霜的心，宇宙里怕是没有比这更大的奇迹了。

t_ch: 哈？你说什么？

t_ch: 总是声称要拿黑洞作藏品，其实资金预算才是最大的黑洞，早晚要把空间站吞下去。

t_ch: 终究是给的不够多。

t_ch: 哼，有点意思。

t_ch: 难怪变成了黑子。
t_en: No wonder it turned into a Herta hater.

t_ch: 黑子？这个昵称倒怪可爱的。
t_en: Herta hater? That actually sounds kinda cute.

t_ch: 这下不是应声虫了。
t_en: Well, at least it's no longer just parroting.

t_ch: 「有主见」和「信口胡诌」，两者的概念可是天差地别。
t_en: There's a world of difference between having opinions and spouting nonsense.

t_ch: 总而言之，人偶完全是在胡说。第四面镜一向客观，不信我来问问。
t_en: In any case, the puppet is clearly talking nonsense. The Fourth Mirror is always objective. Let's ask it and see.

t_ch: 魔镜魔镜告诉我，谁是这世上集美貌与智慧于一身的人？
t_en: Mirror, mirror, floating there, who holds beauty and wisdom beyond compare?

t_ch: 连接至匹诺康尼网络，根据本地点赞量最高的回答——当然是知更鸟女士。
t_en: Connecting to the Penacony network. Based on the most-liked answer at this location — the answer is, of course, Miss Robin.

t_ch: 这又是哪位！
t_en: Who even is that?

t_ch: （趁黑塔教第四面镜什么是*客观*的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
t_en: (While Herta's busy teaching the Fourth Mirror a thing or two about being objective, might as well name the drink.)

t_ch: 「倒反天罡」。
t_en: "Break the Norms."

t_ch: 算是无聊生活里不错的调味剂吧。不过，闹腾不出什么水花。
t_en: A decent little spice in an otherwise boring life. But still, it won't make much of a splash.

t_ch: 「黑粉也是粉」。
t_en: "Haters Are Fans in Denial."

t_ch: 被人谈论是很糟糕的事，但更糟糕的是根本没人谈论。
t_en: Being talked about sucks. But being ignored is even worse.

t_ch: （嗯，就这样，把调饮的名字和效果记录下来吧。）
t_en: (Alright, that's it. Just jot down the drink names and effects.)

t_ch: 人偶把感官信标接收到的数据发给我了。嗯，看起来味道不错。
t_en: The puppet just sent me the latest sensory beacon data. Hmm, seems the flavor was decent.

t_ch: （这个配方或许还有发掘的空间……）
t_en: (This recipe might have more potential to explore...)

t_ch: 要不要再试一杯？
t_en: Ready for another glass?

t_ch: 相比于小白鼠，我更习惯当掌控一切的观察者。请吧，你可以让人偶再试试。
t_en: I prefer being the all-seeing observer over being a test subject. Go ahead, you can let the puppet try again.

t_ch: 为黑塔女士服务，我的荣幸！
t_en: It's an honor to serve Madam Herta!

t_ch: （暂时离开）
t_en: (Leave For Now)

t_ch: 这个配方暂时先试到这里吧。
t_en: Let's call it a day for this recipe trial.

t_ch: 人偶给了我最新的感官数据。一切正常，只是理智指标略微有些混乱。
t_en: The puppet provided updated sensory feedback. Everything checks out, though the rationality index is slightly unstable.

t_ch: 今天的实验就到此为止吧，做得还不错，姑且对你表示赞扬。
t_en: That's all for today's experiment. You did fairly well. Consider that a compliment for you.

t_ch: （结束营业）
t_en: (Close up for the day)

t_ch: 这个配方就试到这里吧。
t_en: Let's stop testing this recipe here.

t_ch: 一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
t_en: All set up and ready to open!

t_ch: 今天会遇见什么样的客人呢……
t_en: I wonder who'll walk through that door today...

t_ch: 你朝走廊的尽头张望，想一睹为快。回廊空空荡荡的，没有透露任何秘密。
t_en: You peek down the hallway, curious to catch a glimpse. But it's empty and reveals no secret.

t_ch: 客人还没有来。
t_en: No customers yet.

t_ch: 可以摸会儿鱼了…
t_en: Guess that means it's chill time...

t_ch: 嘿！东张西望什么呢？
t_en: Hey! What are you looking at?

t_ch: 站在吧台里左顾右盼、鬼鬼祟祟…小灰毛，你又偷吃什么了？
t_en: Sneaking around behind the bar, shifty eyes and all... What'd you sneak a bite of this time, Gray Hair?

t_ch: 我在假装四处看风景。
t_en: I was pretending to admire the view.

t_ch: 我在做颈椎健康体操。
t_en: I was doing neck stretches.

t_ch: 花火大人听到了些小道消息，在我的地盘上，竟然冒出了个兜售古怪调饮的家伙。
t_en: Word on the street is that some weird upstart has been peddling funky drinks on my turf.

t_ch: 这种咄咄怪事，我怎么能不来瞧瞧呢？
t_en: You think I'd let something that strange slide without coming to check it out?

t_ch: 真是人红是非多啊。
t_en: Fame really does come with baggage, huh.

t_ch: 梦境里的大名人，窝在小酒吧里给人调饮…嘻，肯定有什么好玩的事瞒着我对吧？
t_en: The big-shot from the Dreamscape, slinging drinks in some back-alley dive? Heh, you've definitely been keeping something fun from me, I assume?

t_ch: 来都来了，也喝一杯吧。
t_en: Well, since you're already here, why not have a drink?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，真聪明，我就是为这个来的~
t_en: Hehe, smart move! That's exactly why I came~

t_ch: 花火和你眼神相触，一丝不祥的预感从你的脑海中闪过。
t_en: Your eyes meet Sparkle's and suddenly, you get the sinking feeling something bad's about to happen.

t_ch: 反应过来时，你已经被踢到了吧台外。而对面，花火早已津津有味地翻看了一遍「特调配方」。
t_en: Before you can react, you're booted out from behind the bar. Sparkle's already flipping through the "Special Mix Recipes" on the other side.

t_ch: 有意思有意思，这种乐子竟然藏着掖着，真把我当外人了呀~
t_en: That's quite interesting. So you've been keeping all the fun to yourself? That's not how you treat a friend?

t_ch: 我也来调一杯吧，嗯…就试这份「梦乡」调饮好了。
t_en: Guess I'll mix one too. Hmm... let's see what this "Dreamland" drink is all about.

t_ch: 准备好了吗，小灰毛——
t_en: Are you ready, Little Gray?

t_ch: 这位顾客，久等了！调酒大师花火的倾情巨献，要细细品味哦。
t_en: Thanks for waiting, dear guest! Here comes a handcrafted masterpiece by your master mixologist Sparkle. Sip it slow.

t_ch: 为了我们的友谊，干杯！
t_en: To our friendship, cheers!

t_ch: 此处应有冷笑话。
t_en: At this point, a lame joke is expected.

t_ch: 一位悲悼伶人和假面愚者在酒馆相遇了。几杯调饮下肚，悲悼伶人开始哭诉起来。
t_en: A Mourning Actor and a Masked Fool walk into a bar. After a few drinks, the Actor starts sobbing.

t_ch: 「我没有父母，没有朋友，更身无长物，只有这副该死的面具！」
t_en: "I have no parents, no friends, no possessions... just this darn mask!"

t_ch: 「不，朋友，你错了。」假面愚者拍拍他的肩膀，安慰道，「你现在连面具都没有了。」
t_en: "No, friend, you're mistaken." The Fool pats his shoulder and says, "Now you don't even have your mask."

t_ch: 您理解了吗？「悲悼」伶人又「被盗」了，令人黯然神伤。
t_en: Now the Mourning Actor's got nothing left. What a mourn-umental loss! Get it?

t_ch: 谁问你了？
t_en: Nobody asked you for this joke.

t_ch: 这位顾客，你好，请有序排队，提前准备好取餐码。
t_en: Good day, dear customer! Please wait in line and have your pickup code ready.

t_ch: 这里只有我一个客人。
t_en: I'm literally the only customer here.

t_ch: 这么快就适应客人的身份啦，小灰毛？别急，这就给你上餐~
t_en: Getting comfy in your customer role already, Gray Hair? Hold tight, your order's coming right up~

t_ch: 我根本没收到取餐码。
t_en: I never got a pickup code.

t_ch: 当然没有，因为我根本就没发呀。嘻嘻，这杯饮料就送给你吧~
t_en: Of course you didn't. I never sent one. Hehe~ this one's on the house!

t_ch: 请慢用，不好喝可以免费重做哦~
t_en: Enjoy. If it tastes off, I'll gladly make another one for free!

t_ch: 你喝下调饮，突然间眼前一黑。
t_en: You take a sip... and everything goes black.

t_ch: 此次征讨的并非宵小之辈，而是弹指间能碾碎星辰的一方绝灭大君……
t_en: We're not up against some petty thug this time. This is a Lord Ravager. It could crush the stars in the blink of an eye...

t_ch: 大君已至阵前，有劳「星穹」仙舟的{NICKNAME}将军统筹。将军，请校阅各仙舟事宜吧。
t_en: The Lord Ravager has arrived at the front line. General {NICKNAME} of the Xianzhou "Star Rail," the command is yours. Please review the mobilization across the Xianzhou ships.

t_ch: 我当将军，真的假的？
t_en: Wait, I'm a General? For real?

t_ch: 呵呵，将军又在说笑了。大敌当前，还请将军指点阵前事宜。
t_en: Haha, you never fail to amuse us, General. But now's no time for jokes. Your leadership is needed more than ever.

t_ch: 你去给幽囚狱加几道门。
t_en: Go reinforce the Shackling Prison. Add a few extra doors while you're at it.

t_ch: 顺便多上几把锁。
t_en: And don't forget to put on a few more locks.

t_ch: 多谢将军提醒。我会向十王司着重交代此事。
t_en: Thank you for the reminder, General. I'll make sure the Ten-Lords Commission gets the message loud and clear.

t_ch: 呵呵，{NICKNAME}将军仗义相助，老头子也不得不出一份力了。为此歼灭大君一役，朱明仙舟已向友邦求购矿石煤炭，并征用半数商舸，以添运力。
t_en: With you stepping up, General {NICKNAME}, even this old man can't sit idle. For the sake of this campaign to destroy a Lord Ravager, the Xianzhou Zhuming has already secured ore and coal shipments from our allies and seized half our merchant ships to boost logistics.

t_ch: 定让那大君仓皇而逃！
t_en: We'll send that Overlord running with its tail between its legs!

t_ch: 刀枪剑戟、甲胄丹药，均已齐备，必能确保物资供给无忧。
t_en: Knives, spears, swords, helmets, armor, and medicinal pellets are all prepped and ready. Supply lines are locked in.

t_ch: 多来点苏乐达，我爱喝。
t_en: Make sure there's extra SoulGlad. I'm hooked on that stuff.

t_ch: 呵呵，吃穿用度、诸般物事，自然也是少不了的。
t_en: Haha, don't worry. We've got all the creature comforts covered too.

t_ch: 亏得炎老解决后顾之忧，诸将士摩拳擦掌，士气愈发高涨了。
t_en: Thanks to master Huaiyan securing the rear, morale's through the roof. Our troops are fired up and ready to go.

t_ch: 曜青云骑皆已整装待发，只待{NICKNAME}将军一声令下，便能冲锋陷阵，斩将夺旗，与那大君一较高低。
t_en: The Yaoqing Cloud Knights are locked and loaded. Just say the word, General {NICKNAME}, and they'll charge headfirst into the fray!

t_ch: 能有诸位相助，优势在我！
t_en: With comrades like you at my side, victory's already halfway ours!

t_ch: 把本将军的竞锋舰炮拉过来！
t_en: Get me my Skysplitter cannons!
